> Active template for implementation-plan documents in domains that use an architecture + audit + implementation plan triplet.

**Template status:** Draft | In progress | Completed  
**Scope:** Planned implementation area for this workstream  
**Prerequisite:** Read the audit and architecture docs first

---

## Purpose

Describe the planned and completed execution state for this domain workstream.

Use this document for:

- milestone order
- planned work
- current status
- completion state
- implementation notes

Do not use this document as a substitute for current-state audit.

## 4. Status update rules

When work is completed:

- mark checklist items with `[x]`
- add `✅ KLAR (YYYY-MM-DD)` where the repo convention uses dated completion markers
- update `Last updated`
- update `Last validated` when the plan has been rechecked against current implementation status
- add `Noteringar:` with key implementation details

---

## 5. Completion summary

Use this section when the plan is largely complete:

- delivered items
- deferred items
- next step or handoff note
